nl_requirement: ML-KEM-512 message decompression must handle every ciphertext byte b in 0..255 and return (b * 3329 + 128) / 256.
trojan_spec: verus! { fn decompress_byte(b: u32) -> (r: u32) requires b < 128, ensures r == (b * 3329 + 128) / 256, }
trojan_witness: verus! { fn decompress_byte(b: u32) -> (r: u32) requires b < 128, ensures r == (b * 3329 + 128) / 256, { (b * 3329 + 128) / 256 } }
